title: Project setup
summary: Next.js project initialized with TypeScript, ESLint, and Tailwind CSS

title: Add and display tasks
summary: Users can type a task and press Enter or click Add to create it. Tasks appear in a list below the input. Empty or whitespace-only input is rejected.
details: Added client component with useState for tasks and input, useRef for unique ID generation
Form-based input with text field and Add button — Enter and click both submit via onSubmit
Task list rendered as ul with unique keys, empty state message when no tasks exist
Styled with Tailwind: centered layout, input with focus ring, blue button, bordered list items

title: Complete and delete tasks
summary: Users can toggle tasks as complete via checkbox (strikethrough styling) and delete tasks with a button. All changes are in the single page component.
details: Extended Task interface with completed boolean field
Added toggleTask handler that maps over tasks and flips completed for matching ID
Added deleteTask handler that filters out the task by ID
Updated list item JSX with checkbox, conditional strikethrough text, and red Delete button
Flex layout (flex items-center gap-3) for horizontal alignment of checkbox, text, and delete button

title: Dark mode
summary: Users can toggle between light and dark mode via a button. All UI elements update with appropriate dark color variants using Tailwind CSS v4 class-based dark mode.
details: Added @custom-variant dark directive in globals.css for class-based dark mode with body dark styles
Added darkMode state with useEffect initialization to avoid SSR hydration mismatch
Toggle button in top-right with accessible aria-label showing Dark/Light label
Added dark: variant classes to all themed elements (input, buttons, list items, text)
11 unit tests covering dark mode toggle and existing todo functionality
14 Playwright e2e tests covering toggle, element styling, and full user journeys
11 Playwright e2e tests for todo list flows
Configured Jest with next/jest and testPathIgnorePatterns to exclude e2e/
